title: Vertical Channel Transistor for sub-10nm 3D DRAM Technology
key_findings: 展示了基于垂直沟道晶体管(VCT)的3D DRAM单元原型，单元面积0.0019μm²，较传统1x nm DRAM缩小56%

title: Capacitor-under-Bitline Architecture for High-Density 3D DRAM
key_findings: 提出电容下置(COB)3D DRAM架构，通过将存储电容移至位线下方实现更高密度的单元堆叠

title: Review: Scaling Challenges and Future of DRAM Technology
key_findings: 综述了DRAM微缩的技术瓶颈和3D DRAM的多种技术路径，预测2028-2030年3D DRAM将进入量产

title: HBM-PIM: Processing-in-Memory for High Bandwidth Memory with Programmable Computing Unit
key_findings: 首次展示在HBM2E中集成可编程计算单元(PCU)，在AI推理任务中实现2.5x能效提升

title: AiM: Accelerator-in-Memory for Transformer-based NLP Inference
key_findings: 基于GDDR6的存内计算加速器AiM，在BERT/GPT-2推理中实现4x能效提升和1.8x吞吐量提升

title: A Survey of Processing-in-Memory Techniques: From Near-Memory to In-Memory Computing
key_findings: 系统综述了从近存计算到存内计算的技术路线，分析了基于SRAM/DRAM/ReRAM/MRAM等不同存储器方案的优劣

title: 3nm GAA Technology with Multi-Bridge-Channel FET for High Performance and Low Power Applications
key_findings: Samsung 3nm GAA MBCFET工艺细节首次公开展示，性能提升23%，功耗降低45%，面积缩小16%

title: Nanosheet GAA Transistor for 2nm CMOS Technology
key_findings: TSMC首次公开2nm N2工艺GAA晶体管特性，n/pFET驱动电流和短沟道效应控制优异

title: Wafer-to-Wafer Hybrid Bonding with <200nm Alignment Accuracy for 3D IC
key_findings: 展示晶圆级混合键合<200nm对准精度，键合强度>2.0J/m²，实现每平方毫米10万个互连点

title: High-NA EUV Lithography: Paving the Way to sub-8nm Resolution
key_findings: High-NA EUV(NA=0.55)系统关键参数公布，分辨率<8nm，anamorphic成像4x/8x，目标产率185wph

title: Fully Integrated ReRAM-based Compute-in-Memory Macro for AI Edge Inference Achieving 117.3 TOPS/W
key_findings: 基于ReRAM的存算一体宏单元实现117.3TOPS/W能效，支持8bit MAC运算，适用于边缘AI推理

title: 8-Inch SiC Substrate: Enabling Cost-Effective High-Volume Manufacturing of SiC Power Devices
key_findings: 8英寸SiC衬底实现低BPD密度(<0.5/cm²)，预计2025年成本将降至6英寸的70%以下

title: 12-Inch Wafer-Scale Monolayer MoS₂ Growth by Three-Step MOCVD for Beyond-Silicon Electronics
key_findings: 首次实现12英寸晶圆级单层MoS₂均匀生长(三步MOCVD)，室温迁移率达45cm²/Vs，展示亚1nm栅长晶体管

title: NorthPole: Neural Inference at the Edge with a Low-Power Fully Digital Architecture
key_findings: IBM NorthPole芯片实现全数字神经形态推理，能效比传统GPU高25x，延迟降低20x，无模拟计算精度损失

title: UCIe: An Open Standard for Die-to-Die Interconnects Enabling the Chiplet Ecosystem
key_findings: UCIe 1.0标准技术细节详解，覆盖2D/2.5D/3D封装场景，带宽密度最高1.35TB/s/mm(advanced封装)

title: CXL 3.0 Fabric: Enabling Composable and Disaggregated Memory Architecture for Data Centers
key_findings: 基于CXL 3.0交换结构构建内存分解数据中心，证明TCO可降低30-40%(内存利用率从50%提升至85%)

title: Backside Power Delivery Network: A Paradigm Shift in CMOS Power Distribution
key_findings: 背面供电(PowerVia)技术使IR压降降低5-7x，标准单元面积缩小8-12%，信号布线资源增加1.5x

title: Complementary FET: The Next Generation Transistor Architecture for sub-1nm Logic
key_findings: CFET实现nMOS/pMOS垂直集成，标准单元面积缩小55%，RO延迟降低20%，但面临热预算和中间互连挑战

title: CoWoS-L: Large-Scale 2.5D Integration with Local Silicon Interconnect for AI and HPC
key_findings: CoWoS-L将硅中介层尺寸突破3.5x reticle，支持8颗HBM3E+1颗超大GPU(>800mm²)的异构集成

title: HBM3E: Enabling Next-Gen AI with 1.2TB/s Bandwidth and Improved Power Efficiency
key_findings: HBM3E 12-Hi实现1.28TB/s带宽，能效4pJ/bit，通过全新TSV冗余方案提升良率至>90%
